theme.style: Black-and-gold real estate luxury meets fintech precision. Deep obsidian backgrounds with molten gold light, brushed metal textures, and glass-like reflections evoke exclusivity and high-value property investment. Lighting is dramatic and directional, giving a boardroom-at-night feeling — confident, elite, and quietly powerful.

slides.label: Members Registry
slides.backgroundPrompt: Rich cinematic obsidian black environment with sweeping diagonal arcs of molten gold light cutting across the frame, dramatic rim lighting from the lower right, floating translucent glass shards catching warm golden reflections, fine gold dust particles suspended in the air, the upper 30% darker and calm for text clarity, 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups
